description_long: This is a large, modern entertainment wall unit made primarily of light-colored wood with a natural grain finish. The structure features two tall vertical cabinets on either side, each with a long, dark vertical panel that likely conceals doors or storage compartments. Between the cabinets, there is a wide horizontal shelf above a central base unit, which includes two open shelves and two closed compartments. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical layout. The unit is suitable for storing electronics, books, or decorative items, and its size suggests it could serve as a focal point in a living room or lounge area. The visible surfaces are smooth and matte, with no visible handles or glass panels.
description: A large, light wood entertainment wall unit with two tall cabinets, a central shelf, and a base with open and closed storage. The design is modern, minimalist, and symmetrical.
description_view_0: Front view showing both tall cabinets, the central shelf, and the base with open and closed compartments.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit and the thickness of the cabinets and shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood backs of the cabinets and shelf, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel of the cabinet.
